name: Insulin and IGF Axis Modulation Coverage Repair

scope.question: Which known source-completeness gaps for Insulin and IGF Axis Modulation need repair, and does resolving them change the coverage verdict or public boundaries?

summary: Coverage repair checked the acarbose aging registry records, FMD/longevity-diet trial-watch records, and recent review/meta-analysis context named by the June 3 coverage assessment. NCT02953093 posted results after early termination, but the planned tissue gene-expression, serum miRNA, and fecal microbiome endpoints were not analyzable or not reported. NCT02865499 posted a very small uncontrolled microbiome result that does not establish aging efficacy. The FMD/longevity-diet registries remain no-results or recruiting/unknown-status context. Recent PubMed review triangulation did not reveal a missing primary anchor that would change the public stage, blockers, evidence map, or confidence. The repaired assessment can move from thin to adequate coverage while retaining high-priority evidence gaps and returning the track to ordinary surveillance.

materiality_decision.rationale: The checked registries and reviews clarify source coverage but do not add a controlled human functional, disease, disability, multimorbidity, or mortality result. The current low-confidence human_biomarker_signal public outlook remains bounded and does not need a candidate bundle from this repair.

search_log.summary: Terminated phase 2 crossover acarbose study in older men; results posted June 24, 2025, after early termination for lack of funding. Posted outcome entries report no analyzable tissue gene-expression data, no serum miRNA sequencing results, and uninterpretable fecal microbiome results.

Completed single-group acarbose pilot in geriatric subjects with 8 enrolled and 6 analyzed; posted microbiome outcome does not provide controlled aging biomarker, functional, disease, or mortality evidence.

FMD/longevity-diet records remain trial-watch context: NCT05698654 has unknown overall status with no posted results, NCT07065955 is completed retrospective no-results context, and NCT07255300 is recruiting follow-up context through 2027.

search_log.query: Recent reviews for insulin-like growth factor aging, acarbose aging/longevity, fasting-mimicking diet aging, and protein restriction IGF-1 aging, 2024-2026
search_log.summary: Recent review/meta-analysis triangulation identified acarbose clinical-trial-progress review context, GH treatment and GH/IGF inflammation reviews, amino-acid restriction review context, FMD review context, and human IGF-1 dietary meta-analyses. None required a public insulin/IGF-axis outlook update.

excluded_sources.title: Study of Acarbose in Longevity
excluded_sources.reason: Terminated early with posted but non-informative primary and secondary outcome entries. It is useful limiting context for acarbose translation but not a public evidence-map update.

excluded_sources.title: Acarbose Anti-aging Effects in Geriatric Subjects (Substudy B & C)
excluded_sources.reason: Very small uncontrolled acarbose pilot with a microbiome-only posted outcome and no aging functional, disease, disability, multimorbidity, or mortality endpoint.

excluded_sources.title: Fasting-mimicking Diet and Longevity Diet, Body Composition and Aging
excluded_sources.reason: No posted public results; unknown overall status with last known recruiting status, so it remains trial-watch context.

excluded_sources.title: Longevity Diet and the Fasting-mimicking Diet
excluded_sources.reason: Completed retrospective registry record without posted results; useful for monitoring but not evidence for a public insulin/IGF-axis update.

excluded_sources.title: Follow up Study of Varapodio Trial: Effect of Longevity and Fasting Mimicking Diet on Risk Factors Age Correlated and Biomarkers of Aging
excluded_sources.reason: Recruiting follow-up registry with estimated completion in 2027 and no posted results.

excluded_sources.title: Repurposing effect of cardiovascular-metabolic drug to increase lifespan: a systematic review of animal studies and current clinical trial progress
excluded_sources.reason: Recent systematic review confirms acarbose animal-lifespan and registry relevance but does not add a reviewed human acarbose aging efficacy result.

excluded_sources.title: Growth hormone treatment in aged patients with comorbidities: A systematic review
excluded_sources.reason: Recent GH treatment review supports the existing safety-sensitive GH boundary rather than a positive insulin/IGF-axis gerotherapy update.

excluded_sources.title: Amino acid restriction, aging, and longevity: an update
excluded_sources.reason: Recent amino-acid restriction review reinforces translational uncertainty and animal-model concentration for protein restriction rather than changing the public track rating.

excluded_sources.title: Effects of the periodic fasting-mimicking diet on health, lifespan, and multiple diseases: a narrative review and clinical implications
excluded_sources.reason: Recent FMD review context reinforces cross-track FMD relevance but does not supersede the already promoted FMD human biomarker records.

excluded_sources.title: Effect of ketogenic diets on insulin-like growth factor (IGF)-1 in humans: A systematic review and meta-analysis
excluded_sources.reason: Human dietary IGF-1-lowering meta-analysis is adjacent nutrition context, not a defined aging-directed insulin/IGF-axis intervention with functional or durable clinical endpoints.

notes: The acarbose registry results are explicitly logged as coverage-repair exclusions rather than staged because they do not alter the current public boundary.

The already promoted FMD biological-age marker source is relevant cross-track context, but the insulin/IGF outlook already states FMD biomarker movement and blocks functional or durable-outcome upgrades.
Recent review searches did not identify a missing primary anchor strong enough to change the track's stage, confidence, or forecast language.
next_actions: Resume ordinary surveillance for insulin/IGF axis modulation.
Monitor FMD/longevity-diet registry records for posted results, especially NCT05698654 and NCT07255300.
Stage a public candidate bundle only if future acarbose, FMD, or endocrine-modulation results change the evidence map or public boundaries.
